title: Food & Beverage Service Fundamentals
description: Comprehensive training on restaurant and banquet service standards, menu knowledge, table etiquette, and handling guest dietary requirements.

title: Housekeeping Standards and Procedures
description: Professional housekeeping training covering room cleaning procedures, linen management, guest privacy, and maintaining brand cleanliness standards.

title: Introduction to Hospitality Management
description: Foundational course covering hotel operations, service culture, organizational structure, and career paths in hospitality.

title: Customer Experience Excellence
description: Advanced techniques for creating memorable guest experiences, handling VIP guests, and building long-term customer loyalty.

title: Workplace Communication Skills
description: Essential communication skills for hospitality professionals including verbal, written, and cross-cultural communication.

title: Sustainable Hospitality Practices
description: Training on eco-friendly operations, waste management, energy conservation, and sustainability certifications in hospitality.
